_doc: Machine-readable lane->epic index the ops-monitor (scripts/ops-monitor-check.sh) reads with jq. Join key = epic_id; ready-count per lane = `br ready --parent <epic_id> --limit 0 --json`. A lane is KNOWN/resumable when gate is null or expired; GATED only when a non-null unexpired gate object is present. epic_id:null REQUIRES a non-null gate (the lane has no ready-bead source, so it can never spuriously fire the stall wake). Admiral-owned; captain updates on staffing. Update in the SAME action as any lane add/retask/park. Seed = active + on-deck + parked lanes only (DONE lanes are not staffing candidates).

lanes.label: codename:quality-system
lanes.note: STAFFED 2026-07-07 — alia ONLINE on the C-model (admiral+operator confirmed): builds harness on integration/core-loop-proof in its OWN worktree, daemon executes the matrix ONLY (never merges harness code), prefer codex/non-Claude (pi blocked hk-4ir08), assessor CR-gates integration->main. Phase-1 core-loop-proof: live-verify the real loop across {claude,codex,pi}x{local,remote}; acceptance = top-5 gaps + T10 hk-xke2i (branch-targeting assertion, known-RED, evidence for hk-lgykq). Epic hk-hcrvb; T1 hk-h6fej ready. HANDOFF TRIGGER: when T1 lands, staff crew HAWAT on hk-lgykq (P1 daemon-core fix — wire the dead LandsOn merge path; dogfoods against alia's harness; codex/claude not pi). When T2 lands green -> admiral's Phase-2 twin handoff. Bench .kerf/works/quality-system/; source plans/2026-07-06-quality-system/. Phases 2-3 admiral-owned.

lanes.label: codename:pi-sandbox
lanes.note: STAFFED 2026-07-02 (crew leto; operator made sandbox THE priority — unlock for Pi + DGX local models). Pi-in-a-sandbox via srt; both platforms mac-first; v1 network=OPEN. SPIKE hk-f39ny CLEARED 2026-07-03 (br/comms over unix socket + live model call proven; enableWeakerNetworkIsolation=FALSE secure; Go-CLI-TLS v1-irrelevant). Build chain underway: hk-p7smp profile-gen MERGED (0236ccb5) -> hk-rlxgx argv-wrap (in progress) -> hk-6596l config -> hk-i0377 acceptance; hk-ryi34 attach + hk-5zviv linux (P2). WATCH for the flagless-REQUEST_CHANGES review-wedge (hk-thbbv) on the remaining beads. Artifacts: .kerf/works/pi-sandbox/ + plans/2026-07-02-pi-sandbox/. epic_id:null (kerf work) — ready-count via label.

lanes.label: codename:stall-sentinel

gate.reason: PLANNED not staffed. Kerf work created 2026-07-02 (design+7 beads) for a deterministic stall/wedge detector + tiered escalation (the operator's 'fleet must not stall' fix; captain-relayed task). Un-gate + staff after the sandbox completes (admiral rec), OR sooner via gurney if operator wants stall-protection now. Signal library hk-mxxsl gates the detectors.

lanes.note: Deterministic (no-LLM) sentinel: detect off events.jsonl (NOT tmux), two-layer algo (Layer A per-run stall: heartbeat-gap/review-stall/run-age; Layer B lane no-forward-progress+guard), tiered escalate crew->captain->operator, daemon-integrated Go, config thresholds fail-loud. Beads: hk-mxxsl signal-lib (P1 GATE), hk-l087e Layer-A, hk-r9n2s Layer-B, hk-hm09z config, hk-u9thq escalation, hk-vnsme acceptance, hk-sljlg watch-consume. Companion daemon FIX = hk-thbbv (flagless REQUEST_CHANGES=APPROVE). Brief: plans/2026-07-02-stall-sentinel/DESIGN.md; artifacts .kerf/works/stall-sentinel/.

lanes.label: codename:pilot
lanes.note: PROVEN + PARKED 2026-07-02. Pi runs live end-to-end (hk-d5q5l on agent_type=pi, gpt-5.4-mini via OpenRouter, merged 2min). CAPABILITY: gpt-5.4-mini does trivial doc beads but exits-without-committing on real Go. OPERATOR: HOLD Pi until the sandbox lands, then test DGX/local + a couple models via the sandbox. AUTH: Pi is on OpenRouter (sk-or- key); operator PREFERS Pi's own OpenAI SUBSCRIPTION (~/.pi/agent) — needs harness change hk-ecoh8 (native-auth, no injected key). Config reverted to open-weight minimax/minimax-m3 (correct OpenRouter pairing). Routing footgun: harness:pi LABEL required (hk-ytzj2).

Owns hk-4ir08 (DGX reasoning-model no-toolcalls) + hk-pkugu (daemon leaks claude tier-3 into pi runs). If per-bead switch unsupported, IMPLEMENT it. DoD = single-mode pi canary green with confirmed provider requests (run_started is NOT green; watch srt-sandbox landmine). This is the token-cheap-matrix taproot T9/hk-jjt6w waits on. PLUS the 4 bug classes become quality-harness corpus cases (joint chani+stilgar).

lanes.label: codename:quality-enforcement
lanes.note: STAFFED 2026-07-07. Workstream A (P0 bleeding-stopper) of epic hk-clska: make gates fail-CLOSED. Live git hooks == lefthook.yml + CI assert; drop continue-on-error in ci.yml/scenario.yml; real diff-keyed agent-reviewer/run the commit hook cross-checks (stub fails CLOSED); branch-protect main (NOT unilateral — gurney designs required-checks set, hands gh-api apply to captain/admiral for coordination). Config/enforcement, no kerf. GATE 2026-07-08: A5 (hk-q6axs.5 drop continue-on-error) + A6 (.6 branch-protect) PARKED behind 'make check-short green-on-main' — which is RED under -race saturation on TWO fronts: (1) srt sandbox-apply hk-tch4t (REOPENED — in-process gate can't serialize a system-wide 300s storm; hawat building fail-loud), (2) 5 non-srt tests hk-me8ru (stilgar). gurney2-q PAUSED. Fail-closed goes live only on BOTH-green + daemon REDEPLOY (redeploy hard-held; merge-to-main is cosmetic staging, live daemon runs old binary).

lanes.label: codename:quality-enforcement
lanes.note: STAFFED 2026-07-08 11:46Z (captain). Bead hk-me8ru (P1). Srt-INDEPENDENT half of A5's green-on-main precondition: de-flake the 5 non-srt check-short tests that RED under full -race saturation (brcli TestStderrCapScenarioPartialStderrAtSIGKILL; daemon TestQuitOnReviewFile_HeartbeatCeiling + TestL2_SSHLocalhost_TmuxPaneID; keeper TestWatcher_OperatorWarnFn_ThrottledByWarnCooldown; specaudit AR052). hawat owns the srt piece (hk-tch4t) in parallel. Reproduce-first, classify race/timing vs environmental (disk 92% + GOCACHE purge landmine), de-flake (serialize/bound/deterministic-clock, hk-ri2in toolkit), accept only across MULTIPLE full runs. Out-of-daemon isolated-worktree -> 2 reviewers -> ff-land. stilgar's scripted-twin lane (hk-ynyd3, ST5 substrate-gated) stays parked meanwhile. epic_id:null — ready-count via label.
